arts.ttl: How much Arsenal have earned from Champions League run as Real Madrid win delivers huge bonus
arts.sum: Arsenal have been handed financial boost ahead of the summer transfer window, thanks to their progression to the Champions League semi-final. Therefore, thanks to six wins and a third place finish, the Gunners earned £38.64 million from the group stage alone.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Russo, Kelly fit for UWCL semis vs. Lyon
arts.sum: Renee Slegers has confirmed that Alessia Russo and Chloe Kelly are back in contention for the first leg of the UWCL semifinal on Saturday against Lyon.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news for Ipswich Town as Mikel Arteta makes Kai Havertz return claim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has provided injury updates on three Arsenal players before his side return to Premier League action. "Jorginho is not going to be available yet, he's still struggling with that incident," Arteta admitted when asked about the midfielder after he suffered a rib issue against Brentford .
